Maze- Child Interest/Engagement: child acts with vigor, confidence, and eagerness; takes active interest and invests effort
Maze- Child Positive Affect: frequency and intensity with which the child expresses positive affect
Notes: 1 = Infrequent, low intensity; 5 = Frequent, high intensity

ElementDescription: Maze- Child Negativity to Mother: degree to which child shows anger, dislike, or hostility to mom (e.g. forcefully rejecting ideas, pouting, being unreasonable demanding or critical of mom)
Maze- Child Negative Affect (angry, sad, fearful, anxious): frequency and intensity with which the child expresses negative affect
Notes: 1 = Infrequent, low intensity; 5 = Frequent, high intensity

ElementDescription: Maze- Child Compliance: degree to which child shows willingness to listen to mom and matches behavior to mom's directions; don't count unresponsiveness to unclear directions as noncompliance

Maze- Child Impulsivity: degree to which child appears to act too quickly or hastily; low inhibitory control; appears unable to wait for instructions; appears to engage in tasks with no planning or thought

Maze- Quality of Relationship: strong sense of relatedness and mutual engagement between mom and child (maybe share gazes, smile, converse); interactions appear natural and enjoyable; conflicts are easily and quickly resolved

Story Cards- Mother Supportive Presence: expresses positive regard and emotional support to child, e.g., acknowledges accomplishments, encourages, reassures positively, acts as secure base; be sure to watch for signs of questionable support, e.g., mismatching verbal and body cues

Story Cards- Mother Intrusiveness: fails to recognize child's efforts to gain autonomy; interferes with child's needs, interests, or behaviors; it is intrusive if mom's actions indicate lack of respect for child; can occur in harsh physical manner or as intrusive affection like kissing or hugging; be sure to look at context of child's actions and child's reactions
Story Cards- Mother Hostility: expresses anger or rejects child; blames child for mistakes; may not support child emotionally; be sure to strongly weigh any clearly hostile events

Story Cards- Mother Quality of Instruction: how well mom structures the situation for the child and provides hints or corrections that are timely, logical, understandable to child, stated clearly, etc.; mom shows she has a plan yet is flexible and rephrases when needed to match child's effort
Story Cards- Mother Positive Affectivity: frequency and intensity of mother's expression of positive affect
Notes: 1 = Low Positive Affect; 3 = High Positive Affect

ElementDescription: Story Cards- Mother Negative Affectivity: frequency and intensity of mother's expression of negative affect
Notes: 1 = Low Positive Affect; 3 = High Positive Affect

ElementDescription: Story Cards- Child Persistence: extent child is problem-oriented in the session; child is actively engaged, not merely compliant to mom's directions; attempts solutions with/without help; shows motivation to solving task
